cleanedEvents.title: BMT/ER guidance if symptoms persist
cleanedEvents.description: If symptoms persist, go to the ER for evaluation. See if the lab can add on an A1c. Other labs are in process.

cleanedEvents.title: Hydrocortisone and fludrocortisone doses increased
